case_title: HEATHER L. YOUNG VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, HEATHER L.
